hadiths.hadith: Actions are judged by intentions.
The religion (Islam) is easy.

hadiths.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
hadiths.hadith: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا، سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
hadiths.hadith: Whoever travels a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make the path to Jannah easy for him.
The merciful will be shown mercy by the Most Merciful.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadiths.hadith: A Muslim is one from whose tongue and hands other Muslims are safe.
Purification is half of faith.
Charity extinguishes sins.
Whoever does not show mercy will not be shown mercy.
Dua (supplication) is worship.
The best among you is the one who learns the Quran and teaches it.
Modesty is part of faith.
Your smile in the face of your brother is charity.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadiths.hadith: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
A kind word is charity.

hadiths.arabic: أَحَبُّ الأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَدْوَمُهَا وَإِنْ قَلَّ
hadiths.hadith: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if they are small.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُؤْمِنُ الْقَوِيُّ خَيْرٌ وَأَحَبُّ إِلَى اللَّهِ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِ الضَّعِيفِ
hadiths.hadith: The strong believer is better and more beloved to Allah than the weak believer.
Do not get angry.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ صَلَّى الْعِشَاءَ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ فَكَأَنَّمَا قَامَ نِصْفَ اللَّيْلِ
hadiths.hadith: Whoever prays Isha in congregation, it is as if he stood half the night in prayer.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ قَالَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ مِائَةَ مَرَّةٍ حُطَّتْ خَطَايَاهُ
hadiths.hadith: Whoever says 'Subhan Allah wa bihamdihi' 100 times, his sins will be forgiven.
Fear Allah wherever you are.
Patience is illumination.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ حُسْنِ إِسْلامِ الْمَرْءِ تَرْكُهُ مَا لا يَعْنِيهِ
hadiths.hadith: Part of the perfection of someone's Islam is his leaving alone that which does not concern him.
Paradise lies at the feet of mothers.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ طَيِّبٌ لا يَقْبَلُ إِلاَّ طَيِّبًا
hadiths.hadith: Allah is pure and accepts only that which is pure.
Injustice will be darkness on the Day of Resurrection.
Whoever deceives us is not one of us.
The halal is clear and the haram is clear.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ إِذَا عَمِلَ أَحَدُكُمْ عَمَلًا أَنْ يُتْقِنَهُ
hadiths.hadith: Allah loves that when one of you does something, he does it with excellence.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ أَخُو الْمُسْلِمِ لا يَظْلِمُهُ وَلا يُسْلِمُهُ
hadiths.hadith: A Muslim is the brother of a Muslim. He neither oppresses him nor humiliates him nor looks down upon him.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ فِي حَاجَةِ أَخِيهِ كَانَ اللَّهُ فِي حَاجَتِهِ
hadiths.hadith: Whoever fulfills the needs of his brother, Allah will fulfill his needs.
There should be neither harming nor reciprocating harm.

hadiths.arabic: مِنْ حُسْنِ إِسْلامِ الْمَرْءِ تَرْكُهُ مَا لا يَعْنِيهِ
hadiths.hadith: Part of someone's being a good Muslim is leaving alone that which does not concern him.

hadiths.arabic: لَيْسَ الْغِنَى عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْعَرَضِ وَلَكِنَّ الْغِنَى غِنَى النَّفْسِ
hadiths.hadith: Richness is not having many possessions, but richness is contentment of the soul.
Give gifts and you will love one another.
